chunks.title: Daily Burnt Offering
chunks.reason: Establishes the routine morning and evening sacrifice instructions.

chunks.title: Sabbath Offerings
chunks.reason: Specifies the additional sacrifices required for the weekly Sabbath.

chunks.title: Monthly Offerings
chunks.reason: Details the burnt and sin offerings for the beginning of each month.

chunks.title: Feast of Unleavened Bread
chunks.reason: Outlines the sacrifices for Passover and the seven-day feast.

chunks.title: Feast of Weeks
chunks.reason: Describes the offerings for the Feast of Weeks and its holy convocation.
